title: Archived Source Inspection
description:
Use the Wayback Machine to locate the earliest available archived snapshot of 'https://www.offensive-security.com'.

Open that snapshot and inspect the HTML source of the archived page itself (not the Wayback interface).

Within the page’s HEADER section, identify the first word of the first paragraph contained there.

The answer is case-sensitive.
hints: Make sure you select the earliest snapshot available.
Use 'View Page Source' and analyse the archived page HTML, not the Wayback wrapper.
Only analyse the HTML that appears AFTER: <!-- END WAYBACK TOOLBAR INSERT -->
